section_miscategorizations.text: The patient's nails also show ridges consistent with psoriasis.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Nail ridges are an objective physical finding rather than a patient-reported symptom or history detail, so they fit better under exam findings.

section_miscategorizations.text: Examination reveals good range of motion in the toes and nails.
section_miscategorizations.expected_section: Findings and/or History of Present Illness
section_miscategorizations.reason: The phrase 'range of motion in the toes and nails' is internally inconsistent; nails do not have range of motion. This likely reflects a documentation/phrasing error rather than a section misplacement, but could mildly confuse interpretation of the exam findings.
